description_long: This object consists of three distinct shrub-like plants, each with unique foliage and floral features. The leftmost plant has upright, jagged green leaves and clusters of small, pale yellow flowers atop slender stems, resembling a dandelion or wildflower. The central plant is a low, spreading shrub with thin, vine-like stems, dark green leaves, and small red berry-like fruits, giving it a bushy, tangled appearance. The rightmost plant features a thick, upright stem with a large, round, pale yellow flower head and broad, lobed green leaves at its base. All three shrubs display naturalistic textures and coloration, with visible leaf veins and subtle color gradients. The grouping suggests a diverse planting, suitable for urban green spaces or decorative landscaping. The overall composition highlights a mix of flowering and fruiting shrub species, each contributing to a varied and visually interesting display.
description: A group of three visually distinct shrubs: one with yellow flowers and jagged leaves, one with vine-like stems and red berries, and one with a large round yellow flower and broad leaves.
description_view_0: All three shrubs are visible: the upright yellow-flowered shrub on the left, the sprawling berry-bearing shrub in the center, and the broad-leaved, large-flowered shrub on the right.
description_view_1: The large-flowered shrub is now in the foreground on the left, the yellow-flowered shrub is further back, and the berry-bearing shrub is to the right.
description_view_2: The large-flowered shrub is at the top, the yellow-flowered shrub is to the right, and the berry-bearing shrub is at the bottom, showing more of its tangled stems.
description_view_3: The berry-bearing shrub is on the left, the yellow-flowered shrub and large-flowered shrub are grouped together on the right, with the large flower more prominent.
